title: Farnham (Hattie & Ramsey's Wedding)

main_route.excerpt: At 9 Simon, Eve & Tinder left for Hattie's & Ramsey's wedding at Farnham. A lovely family occasion.
We took the scenic routes. Heavy traffic for part of the way back.

unresolved.issue: Coffee visit the morning after the wedding — persons Richard and Mary not further identified; likely in the Farnham area but exact location unknown. Not recorded as a separate stop.
unresolved.excerpt: The morning after we went for coffee & cake at Richard's & Mary's.

boundary_flags: Page B_0314_R is boundary_mixed=true: the August 4th entry is this trip; the Wed Aug 16th entry (Rhayader/Wyside Club Site, Wales) belongs to a separate trip and has been excluded.
summary: A short trip from Birmingham to Farnham, Surrey for Hattie and Ramsey's wedding on Saturday 4 August 2018, attended by Simon, Eve, and Tinder the dog. They stayed overnight and returned home the following morning after coffee with friends, taking scenic routes despite heavy traffic.
extraction_notes: Only Simon, Eve, and Tinder are mentioned as travellers; none of the sons are named for this trip. No campsite is named — overnight accommodation in Farnham is implied by 'the morning after' but not specified. Farnham Castle Park is mentioned as where Tinder was left during the wedding service, not as a separate overnight stop. The page is boundary-mixed: the Aug 16th section (Rhayader/Wales) is a different trip and has been excluded from this route. Date end estimated as 2018-08-05 (day after wedding).
